purpose: COS.Lending.Selling.UI is a frontend application for Cross River Bank's loan selling platform. It provides an interface for managing, viewing, and processing held-for-sale loans across the lending lifecycle, enabling various user roles to interact with loan data, perform approvals, and view loan history.
businessFeatures: Loan history and AI-powered chat interface
External organization access (MPL, Investor, Issuing Bank)

apis.purpose: Retrieve held-for-sale loans with pagination and filtering
Retrieve detailed information about a specific loan
Create or retrieve a chat session for loan history analysis
Retrieve chat history for a loan session
Stream chat responses for loan history queries

dataEntities.name: Loan
dataEntities.description: Represents a loan that is held for sale

dataEntities.name: LoanDetails
dataEntities.description: Extended information about a specific loan

dataEntities.name: PendingApproval
dataEntities.description: Loan waiting for approval in the workflow

dataEntities.name: ChatSession
dataEntities.description: AI-powered conversation session for loan history analysis

messagingPatterns.name: SSE (Server-Sent Events)
messagingPatterns.description: Used for streaming AI responses in the loan history chat interface

findings.title: Credentials in configuration files
findings.description: The Cypress configuration files reference environment variables for authentication which may not be properly secured. Testing credentials should be stored in a secure vault or CI/CD secrets management.

findings.title: CORS-related workaround in documentation
findings.description: The README recommends disabling CORS with a Chrome extension for development. This is an insecure practice and should be replaced with proper CORS configuration on the backend services.
